name: McpSession-Bash
description: Bash functions for the MCP Session Log API. Provides: mcp_session_init, mcp_session_create, mcp_session_update, mcp_session_complete, mcp_session_add_turn, mcp_session_update_turn, mcp_session_add_action, mcp_session_add_file, mcp_session_add_tag, mcp_session_add_context, mcp_session_add_decision, mcp_session_add_requirement, mcp_session_add_blocker, mcp_session_send_dialog. Persists and submits canonical turns-only session-log payloads. Requires jq.
commandTemplate: Save this module to mcp-session.sh, then: source ./mcp-session.sh; mcp_session_init
